meaning: n.芝麻(指其植物或籽),芝麻油
examples: The end, put pignut, currant, gingili on the iced arrow root, don't forget add sugar.
Southern people often eat tangyuan a kind of sweet dumpling made of glutinous rice flour having black gingili peanuts and other nuts in it sometimes often having meat in it.
A novel fast analyzer of gingili analyzer, which employs a fix holographic grating and a linear charge coupled device (CCD) array as the light dispersion system and the detector, was developed.
